title: EDC — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across New York City Economic Development Corporation (EDC) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to EDC's Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us — Mapped In NY, NYC Ferry Ridership, WiredNYC), the edc.nyc / nycedc.com Drupal site, and the modeled real-estate, project, and solicitation entities that EDC does not publish today. Includes the NYC geography spine (borough, BBL/BIN, community board, council district) plus EDC's neighborhood/asset framing. EDC is a public benefit corporation, not a mayoral agency, so its operating data is only sparsely on NYC Open Data.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across EDC datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('NTA').

neighborhood.description: Neighborhood name (EDC frames projects and assets by neighborhood).

Address.description: Street address as carried across EDC datasets and the site.

address.description: Full or primary street address ('Address' / 'Street Address').

ProjectStatus.description: Lifecycle stage of an EDC development project or solicitation.

IncentiveProgram.description: EDC-administered incentive / financing program a project or company may be tied to.
